name: Daiohs Corporation
summary: Daiohs Corporation provides office services in Japan, North America, and Asia. It offers office coffee, tea, and pure water bottle services; facilities services, such as serving and replacing doormats, floor cleaning mops, and various hygiene products; air conditioner inspection, maintenance, and rental services; and other cleaning services. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
